thesis_profile.market_mechanism: in the liquid perp-covered core, leader-continuation alpha in dispersed-up regimes is preserved by embedding froth and structural-extreme penalties directly into the leader sub-signal rather than relying on regime-shared common penalties, while a four-quadrant regime classification keeps carry-dislocation and contrarian laggard tilt scoped to their respective dispersed-down and broad-down regimes
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank liquid perp-covered names higher by blending two adaptive sub-signals (regime-adaptive leader with embedded froth and extreme penalties, plus carry-dislocation) and a strictly-gated contrarian tilt with dispersed-up leader weight pushed to 0.92 to maximize leader strength in the dispersed-up environment where carry dilution has historically been the binding bottleneck
thesis_profile.factor_formula: compute a leader sub-score that internally subtracts frothy-leader and structural-extreme penalties and a carry sub-score plus a strictly-gated contrarian tilt; allocate weights through a four-quadrant per-timestamp interpolation that gives leader 0.92 in dispersed-up, carry 0.75 in dispersed-down, leader-def 0.55 in broad-up, and a leader-carry-contrarian 0.20-0.40-0.40 split in broad-down
